zh: 將字詞組合成固定片語的技巧
en: It is called chunking, and it will change your English forever.
en_example: It is called chunking, and it will change your English forever.
zh_example: It is called chunking, and it will change your English forever.
ja: 単語をグループ化して覚える方法
ja_example: It is called chunking, and it will change your English forever.
kana: たんごをグループかしておぼえるほうほう
romaji: tango o guruupuka shite oboeru houhou

zh: 一組經常一起出現的字詞
en: A chunk is a group of words that always go together.
en_example: A chunk is a group of words that always go together.
zh_example: A chunk is a group of words that always go together.
ja: いつも一緒に使われる単語の集まり
ja_example: A chunk is a group of words that always go together.
kana: いつもいっしょにつかわれるたんごのあつまり
romaji: itsumo issho ni tsukawareru tango no atsumari

en: You just remember the whole phrase.
en_example: You just remember the whole phrase.
zh_example: You just remember the whole phrase.
ja: フレーズ、語句のまとまり
ja_example: You just remember the whole phrase.
kana: フレーズ、ごくのまとまり
～にいそんする、～しだいである
romaji: ~ ni ison suru, ~ shidai de aru

en: This test is a piece of cake.
en_example: This test is a piece of cake.
zh_example: This test is a piece of cake.
ja_example: This test is a piece of cake.
kana: とてもかんたんなこと

en: I was wondering if you could help me.
en_example: I was wondering if you could help me.
zh_example: I was wondering if you could help me.
ja: 丁寧にお願いするときの表現
ja_example: I was wondering if you could help me.
kana: ていねいにおねがいするときのひょうげん
romaji: teinei ni onegai suru toki no hyougen

word: to make a long story short
en: To make a long story short, we missed the train.
en_example: To make a long story short, we missed the train.
zh_example: To make a long story short, we missed the train.
ja_example: To make a long story short, we missed the train.
kk: tu meɪk ə lɔŋ ˈstɔːri ʃɔrt

en: I'm looking forward to the weekend.
en_example: I'm looking forward to the weekend.
zh_example: I'm looking forward to the weekend.
ja_example: I'm looking forward to the weekend.

word: it has nothing to do with
en: It has nothing to do with you.
en_example: It has nothing to do with you.
zh_example: It has nothing to do with you.
ja_example: It has nothing to do with you.
kk: ɪt hæz ˈnʌθɪŋ tu du wɪð

en: By the way, how is your family?
